params.prompt: Use the attached reference photo as the human founder/speaker likeness reference. Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Make the person look like the reference: Thai male founder, smiling/confident, short dark hair, light gray blazer over black shirt, premium speaker/educator presence. Preserve human realism; do not turn him into a robot. Course: HERMES AGENT. Subtitle: Multi-Agent AI Masterclass. Style: Midnight Luxe Editorial, black/charcoal/graphite, silver-white typography, electric royal blue accents, elegant serif headline, clean sans body, high negative space, subtle gridlines/crosshair marks/system UI. Layout: LIMITLESS CLUB top; HERMES AGENT large; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; quote card: Build the team that never sleeps.; Thai line: คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; three chips: Chief of Staff Agent, Content Agent, Vibe Coding Agent; bottom CTA: สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; footer: By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Visual: founder standing inside a premium AI command center with holographic blue dashboards. Clean mobile hierarchy, safe margins, no clutter, no extra logos, no duplicate text.
